sentence: Tell your brousin what the pell booper never stayed long enough to learn.

wombos.definition: Someone who dates around a lot — a pell bepper who hops between boos rather than besties. The romantic, date-hopping counterpart to the universally-liked pell bepper.
A bro who feels like family — someone with the closeness of a cousin but the bond of a best friend. Used as a term of address or reference: 'that's my brousin,' 'brousin, you already know.'
